zh.lifeSummary: Figlia di Uguccione di Carturo是Uguccione Signore di Carturo的女兒，於1242年出生在義大利維圖帕多瓦。她和Niccolo da Carrara至少有2個兒子。她去世在義大利維圖帕多瓦帕多瓦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Figlia di Uguccione di Carturo是Uguccione Signore di Carturo的女儿，于1242年出生在意大利維圖帕多瓦。她和Niccolo da Carrara至少有2个儿子。她去世在意大利維圖帕多瓦帕多瓦。

nameMeanings.name: di
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Chinese:

Mandarin form of the surname 狄, a term referring to the tribes in ancient northern China: (i) from Di (狄), the name of an ancient state (thought to have been located in Hebei or Shandong province), which was granted to Xiao Bo or Kao Bo by King Cheng of Zhou (reigned 1042–1021  BC ). (ii) adopted as a surname by the Ku Di (庫狄) family during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) traced back to other minority ethnic groups in ancient northwestern China.

Mandarin form of the Chinese surname 邸, meaning ‘official residence’ in Chinese: (i) from placename Di (邸), the name of a county (unidentified location). (ii) said to be borne by some descendants of Kujula Kadphises (called 丘就郤 or 邸就郤 in Chinese, 30–c. 80 AD ), founder of the Kushan Empire (one branch of the Yuezhi people originating from western China) located in Central Asia during the Eastern Han dynasty (25–220 AD ).

variants.name: Chi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Dong, Yun, Cheng, Jae, Yong, Cheng Chung, Chi, Chun, Duk, Fang, Feng.  Korean Chung, Chong, Jae Hong, Moon, Myong, Pong, Shen, Yoo, Byung, Chang, Chol, Chong Hun.  Southeast Asian Phi, Hung, Ly, Tu, Denh, Do Van, Duong, Hao, Kieu, Mui, Nga, Phat.

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 池, meaning ‘moat’ in ancient Chinese: (i) acquired as a surname by people who lived beside a moat. (ii) from Chi (池), said to be the name of an ancient state (of unknown location and period). (iii) from the personal name Chi (池), personal name of a son of an official in the state of Qin during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 遲, meaning ‘late’ in Chinese: (i) borne by descendants of Chi Ren (遲任), a person who lived during the Shang dynasty (1600–1046  BC ). (ii) shortened form of the Chinese compound surname Yu-Chi (尉遲), originally the name of a tribe from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China. (iii) from the second element of the personal name Zi Chi (子遲), style name of Fan Xu, a student of Confucius (551–479  BC ).

nameMeanings.name: Uguccione
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Sal, Antonio, Attilio, Biagio, Enrico, Gaetano, Giovanna, Matteo.
Italian (Sicily): from an augmentative of the personal name   Guccio  .

variants.name: Guccio
meanings: Italian: from the late medieval personal name Guccio, a shortened pet form of any of various names ending in -go, for example Arrigo (see Henry ) or Ugo (see Hugh ).

nameMeanings.name: Carturo
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Italian and Spanish: from the personal name Arturo, an equivalent of Arthur .

variants.name: Arthur
meanings: Scottish, Irish, English, German, and French: from the ancient Celtic personal name Arthur. The origin of the name is disputed, but it may be derived from the Latin name Artorius, or it may derive from an old Celtic word meaning ‘bear’ (compare Gaelic art, Welsh arth, both of which mean ‘bear’). It has been in regular use as a personal name in Britain since the early Middle Ages, owing its popularity in large part to the legendary exploits of King Arthur, which gave rise to a prolific literature in Welsh, French, English, German, and other languages. In many cases this is a shortened form of Scottish or Irish McArthur , the patronymic Mac- often being dropped in the 17th, 18th, and 19th centuries under English influence.
West African (Ghana): Anglicized form of the Akan (Fante) name   Atta  .
History: President Chester Alan Arthur (1830–86) was the son of a VT Baptist preacher, William Arthur (1797–1875), who emigrated from Ballymena in northern Ireland c. 1815.

nameMeanings.name: Figlia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Alfonso, Salvatore, Alfonse, Carmelo, Ignazio, Nicolo, Pietro, Sal, Salvator, Santina, Santo, Vita.
Italian: from the personal name Giglia, feminine form of Giglio .

variants.name: Giglio
meanings: From the old Roman family name  Julius  .

en.lifeSummary: Figlia di Uguccione di Carturo was born in 1242, in Padova, Veneto, Italy as the daughter of Uguccione Signore di Carturo. She had at least 2 sons with Niccolo da Carrara. She died in Padova, Padova, Veneto, Italy.

fr.lifeSummary: Figlia di Uguccione di Carturo est née en 1242, à Padova, Veneto, Italie, fille de Uguccione Signore di Carturo. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils avec Niccolo da Carrara. Elle est décédée à Padova, Padova, Veneto, Italie.

de.lifeSummary: Figlia di Uguccione di Carturo wurde 1242 in Padova, Veneto, Italien, als Tochter von Uguccione Signore di Carturo geboren. Sie hatte mit Niccolo da Carrara mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb in Padua, Padova, Veneto, Italien.

it.lifeSummary: Figlia di Uguccione di Carturo è nata il nel 1242 nel Padova, Veneto, Italia come figlia di Uguccione Signore di Carturo. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli con Niccolo da Carrara. Morì nel Padova, Padova, Veneto, Italia.

ja.lifeSummary: Figlia di Uguccione di Carturoは1242年にイタリアベンエトープアドヴァでUguccione Signore di Carturoの娘として生まれた。彼女はNiccolo da Carraraとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼女はイタリアベンエトープアドヴァプアドヴァで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Figlia di Uguccione di Carturo(은)는 1242년 이탈리아 븐토 파도바에서 Uguccione Signore di Carturo의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Niccolo da Carrara(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 이탈리아 븐토 파도바 파도바에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Figlia di Uguccione di Carturo nasceu em 1242, em Padova, Veneto, Itália filha de Uguccione Signore di Carturo. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Niccolo da Carrara. Ela faleceu em Padova, Padova, Veneto, Itália.

ru.lifeSummary: Figlia di Uguccione di Carturo родилась в 1242 г. в местности падова, винето, Италия. Её отца звали Uguccione Signore di Carturo. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына от Niccolo da Carrara. Она умерла в местности падова, падова, винето, Италия.

es.lifeSummary: Figlia di Uguccione di Carturo nació en 1242, en Padova, Veneto, Italia como hija de Uguccione Signore di Carturo. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con Niccolo da Carrara. Murió en Padova, Padova, Veneto, Italia.
